claims.summary: The live regulator is PI with rate/gate/filter behavior, integrator leak, and actuator-aware anti-windup.
claims.disposition: Verify source and focused PI tests rather than treating it as an unbounded accumulating controller.

claims.summary: Viscosity is represented as multi-axis read-only evidence and is not currently a direct PI input or causal verdict.
claims.disposition: Verify viscosity vector, persistence, drag, friction, mobility, cohesion, and authority fields.

claims.summary: Low- and high-pressure windows can be compared for temporal drag and PI afterimage without changing coefficients.
claims.disposition: Route a bounded replay/observation using existing temporal-drag and pressure-snap reviews.

claims.summary: Mapping viscosity into Ki or changing leak, gains, clamps, or target behavior would alter live PI control.
claims.disposition: Retain an exact Tier 5 Mike/operator approval wait with stability, safety, and felt-response gates.
